area_anchor: BRIK email refinement — production readiness hardening
current_truth: Deterministic refinement and parity fallback are implemented, but production-readiness guardrails need stronger test and verification gates.
next_scope_now: Introduce P0 readiness tests for semantic-failure fallback and deterministic repair-chain matrix/idempotency, plus telemetry health thresholds for fallback risk.
adjacent_later: jsonl concurrency stress and archival race validation
evidence_refs: operator-stated: walk through resulting system and make production ready
why: Production readiness requires explicit proof that high-risk quality failures always fail safe and deterministic repairs remain non-regressive under combined failure conditions.

intended_outcome.statement: Email refinement pipeline has P0 production-readiness validation gates for failure-safe behavior and deterministic repair stability.
